mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in RSAFS signals stronger household demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day SPX returns in walk-forward tests, or if the rolling 3-year return spread is negative.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in FEDFUNDS tightens discount rates and raises financing costs, compressing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS 6-month change crosses above +0.75 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:Federal Reserve tightening cycle was observable by June 2005
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tightening episodes have positive 20-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time or if the triggered mean return exceeds the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates while FEDFUNDS is rising, equities face both margin pressure and higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation rate crosses above its 12-month inflation rate and FEDFUNDS 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger does not underperform periods with only one condition active, or if triggered 20-day returns are positive in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE signals weakening labor demand and slower household income growth, reducing expected corporate sales and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE 3-month change crosses above +0.3 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE increases above the trigger are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time or by no drawdown relative to baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A positive 6-month trend in INDPRO indicates improving production volumes and operating leverage, raising expected earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum has a nonpositive coefficient for 60-day SPX returns in walk-forward regressions over two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp fall in HOUST during a FEDFUNDS tightening phase signals housing-led demand weakness amplified by tighter credit, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST 6-month change crosses below -10% while FEDFUNDS 6-month change is above +0.50 percentage points
regime_hint: late-cycle housing downturn under monetary tightening
failure_condition: Reject if the joint housing-tightening trigger does not produce lower 60-day returns than either HOUST weakness or FEDFUNDS tightening alone.

mechanism_narrative: PAYEMS growth combined with a flat or falling UNRATE signals strong labor income without immediate recession pressure, supporting consumption and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE 3-month change is less than or equal to 0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-strength trigger produces lower 5-day SPX returns than the unconditional average in more than half of rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Weak GDPC1 growth combined with accelerating CPIAUCSL signals stagflationary pressure, reducing real earnings growth while keeping policy restrictive and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 year-over-year growth crosses below its prior 4-quarter average while CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation crosses above its 12-month inflation rate
failure_condition: Reject if triggered stagflationary slowdowns are not followed by below-median 60-day SPX returns, or if the interaction term is not negative in walk-forward tests.
